summary: Passionate software engineer with 6+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Expertise in React, Node.js, and cloud technologies. Based in Lagos, Nigeria.

experience.description: Led development of payment processing microservices serving 2M+ users across Africa. Improved system performance by 45% through optimization and implemented CI/CD pipelines.
Built responsive web applications using React and Node.js. Collaborated with cross-functional teams and mentored junior developers in modern development practices.
Developed and maintained financial transaction systems. Gained experience in secure coding practices and payment processing workflows.

education: BS Computer Science, University of Lagos (2018)

projects.name: Payment Gateway API
projects.description: Built a secure payment processing API handling ₦50M+ in daily transactions

projects.name: Fintech Dashboard
projects.description: Developed an analytics dashboard for financial data visualization
